arts.ttl: Galatasaray Announces Official Talks for Morata Transfer
arts.sum: Galatasaray have officially announced the commencement of negotiations for Alvaro Morata's transfer from AC Milan. The Turkish club released a statement confirming that formal discussions have begun, following the common practice of Turkish clubs when finalizing a deal: "Official negotiations have started with the professional footballer Álvaro Borja Morata Martín and his club, AC Milan SPA, for the temporary transfer of the player." The post Galatasaray Announces Official Talks for Morata Transfer appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Video: Galatasaray confirm Morata arrival from Milan

arts.ttl: Galatasaray Make Inquiry About Roma Castaway
arts.sum: Turkish giants Galatasaray have recently inquired about Roma outcast Bryan Cristante, previously linked with Inter. Italian journalist Gianluca Di Marzio claims the Super Lig title favorites intend to add the former Milan midfielder to their ranks this winter. The post Galatasaray Make Inquiry About Roma Castaway appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Newcastle defender Kieran Trippier attracting interest from Turkish champions Galatasaray
arts.sum: Trippier featured for the Magpies as a 64th-minute substitute in Saturday's 2-1 defeat by Newcastle but he is not been a first-team regular under Eddie Howe this season.

arts.ttl: Galatasaray Express Interest in Roma’s Bryan Cristante
arts.sum: Turkish giants Galatasaray have made an inquiry about Roma midfielder Bryan Cristante, signalling their continued interest in strengthening their squad with talent from the Italian Serie A. The post Galatasaray Express Interest in Roma’s Bryan Cristante appeared first on FootItalia.com.
